name: Chutney Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 5 tablespoons orange juice or extra virgin olive oil
black pepper and red pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
Makes about 7/8 cup of dressing: Combine the dry mustard, honey, and mango chutney in a bowl. Add 4 tablespoons of lime juice. Whisk in the orange juice or extra virgin olive oil until well blended. Stir in the remaining olive oil. Season with black pepper and salt to taste (canned hearts of palm may be salty). Remove any remaining strands of mango before refrigerating unused portions.
Pick-A-Dilly is a restaurant in Nassau that is popular with locals as well as tourists. To see similar recipes, visit www.newhope.com/public/delicious
Tested and posted by patH 6/9/97 MC estimates 16.3 cals, 0.6 g fat (28.8% cff)
